title: SV: crash on file with multiple packages, scope resolution issue?

features.name: cross_package_class_inheritance_with_wildcard_import
features.description: Code should include a class that extends another class from a different package, where the subclass package uses a wildcard import from the superclass package
features.snippet: package u_lib; class uvm_void; endclass class uvm_object extends uvm_void; endclass endpackage package t1_pkg; import u_lib::*; class drvr extends uvm_object; endclass endpackage

features.name: nested_package_imports_with_class_resolution
features.description: Code should include a module that imports a package, which itself imports another package via wildcard, where a class in the inner package extends a class from the outer package
features.snippet: package u_lib; class uvm_object; endclass endpackage package t1_pkg; import u_lib::*; class drvr extends uvm_object; endclass endpackage module m; import t1_pkg::*; initial begin $finish(2); end endmodule
